author: doll-agent
content: Added decision_function to FittedLogisticRegression (binary X @ coef + intercept; multiclass X @ weight_matrix.T + intercept_vec), FittedLDA (-½ ‖z - μ_c‖² in projected space), FittedQDA (full quadratic discriminant δ_c(x)), FittedRidgeClassifier (X @ coef_matrix + intercept_vec), FittedLinearSVC (one-vs-rest scores), and FittedLogisticRegressionCV (delegates to inner LogisticRegression). All return Array2<F> with shape (n_samples, 1) for binary and (n_samples, n_classes) for multiclass — slight divergence from sklearn (returns (n_samples,) for binary), kept 2-D for type uniformity. Skipped FittedSGDClassifier (would need conditional logic on the loss enum; defer with #30). All 498 tests pass.
